rewritten_requirements: The system shall start an account as empty when it is first opened.
The system shall activate an account and make it ready to use after setting it up and making an initial deposit.
The system shall allow a user to deposit money while the account is active.
The system shall allow a user to withdraw money while the account is active.
The system shall allow a user to check account details like balance while the account is active.
The system shall make an account inactive if all the money is withdrawn.
The system shall allow closing an account after it has become inactive.
The system shall render an account unusable once it is closed.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: An account starts as empty when it is first opened.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: n account starts as empty when it is first opened.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After setting up and making an initial deposit, the account becomes active and ready to use.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After setting it up and making an initial deposit, it becomes active and ready to use.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: While the account is active, the user can deposit money.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: While the account is active, the user can deposit money, withdraw money, and check account details like balance.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: While the account is active, the user can withdraw money.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: While the account is active, the user can deposit money, withdraw money, and check account details like balance.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: While the account is active, the user can check account details like balance.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: While the account is active, the user can deposit money, withdraw money, and check account details like balance.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If all the money is withdrawn, the account becomes inactive.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If all the money is withdrawn, the account becomes inactive.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After becoming inactive, the account can be closed.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After that, the account can be closed, and once closed, it is no longer usable.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Once closed, the account is no longer usable.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After that, the account can be closed, and once closed, it is no longer usable.
